testcase.name: TC-API-CAT-A01 Verify that Admin retrieves all categories

failure.message: [Response should be a non-empty list] Expecting actual not to be empty

testcase.name: TC-API-CAT-A02 Verify that Admin creates a category with valid name
TC-API-CAT-A03 Verify that Admin updates an existing category
TC-API-CAT-A04 Verify that Admin deletes an existing category
TC-API-CAT-A05 Verify that Validation error for name shorter than 3 characters
TC-API-CAT-U01 Verify that User retrieves all categories
TC-API-CAT-U02 Verify that User retrieves a single category by ID
TC-API-CAT-U03 Verify that User receives 403 trying to create a category
TC-API-CAT-U04 Verify that User receives 403 trying to update a category
TC-API-CAT-U05 Verify that User receives 403 trying to delete a category
